summary: Set 049 Session 4 shipped the extension TS cleanup + Set 045 Explorer revert per spec §5 S4, implementing operator-locked premise P4 (no orchestrator information in the Session Set Explorer — no harvest-record badges, no coordination-conflict pills) alongside retirement of the chatSessionId / check-out / check-in TS surfaces. §4 pre-flight survey ruled out blockers across the webview protocol shape, HarvestService, consumer-repo hooks, and the Gemini/Copilot installer shims; two spec divergences emerged in the survey and were documented inline (HarvestService.ts deleted not stubbed — sole caller disconnected and load-bearing scaffolding is the Python joiner, not the TS cache wrapper; Gemini + Copilot installer shims deleted — both broken-by-construction post-rip with no useful behavior remaining). Source-file deletes (9): src/commands/{checkOutOrchestrator,releaseCheckOut,newChatIdWorkflowToast,installOrchestratorHookGemini,installOrchestratorHookCopilot}.ts + src/providers/{CheckoutPollService,chatSessionMismatchModal,ReadOnlyIntentService,HarvestService}.ts. Test-file deletes (13): src/test/suite/{checkOutOrchestrator,checkOutOrchestratorChatSessionMismatch,releaseCheckOut,chatSessionMismatchModal,checkoutPollService,readOnlyIntentService,readOnlyIntentTiming}.test.ts + src/test/playwright/{new-chat-id-cli-flow,chatsessionid-takeover,chatsessionid-missing-tolerance,checkout-polling,checkout-conflict,harvest-signals}.spec.ts. package.json: 5 command entries removed + dabblerSessionSets.checkoutPollTimeoutMinutes config setting removed. extension.ts: 5 imports + 5 safeRegister calls + the inline CheckoutPollService block + the ReadOnlyIntentService dispose wiring all removed; new Set 049 comment block documents the rip and the surviving surfaces. CustomSessionSetsView.ts: HarvestService dep gone; buildRow no longer attaches harvest signals or conflicts; dispose/refresh no longer touch the harvest cache. sessionSetsWebviewProtocol.ts: 4 retiring types (ConflictKind, ConflictSeverity, HarvestSignalsPayload, ConflictPayload) + 2 RowPayload fields (harvestSignals, conflicts) removed. tree.css + client.js: harvest-badges + harvest-badge* + conflict-pills + conflict-pill + conflict-severity-* rules removed (~95 CSS lines) + renderHarvestBadges + renderConflictPills functions removed (~50 JS lines); row layout reverts to pre-Set-045 shape (name + fraction + description only). ActionRegistry trimmed: dabbler.checkOutOrchestrator entry removed from ROW_ACTIONS (14 entries, was 15); dabbler.openOrchestratorWriterLog retained per T5. Test updates: actionRegistry.test.ts count assertion 15→14 + checkOutOrchestrator-fully-retired test + openOrchestratorWriterLog-stays test; rowMenuHelpers.test.ts flat-actions fixture swapped; watcherInventory.test.ts WATCHER_ALLOWLIST trimmed from 3 to 1 (CheckoutPollService 2 entries gone; extension.ts line 150→141) + baseline assertion 3→1; claudeSessionStartInvoker.test.ts rewritten to match post-S3 shim exports (parsePayload + recoverPriorClaudeModelEffort; the pre-rip extractSessionId + preserveExistingClaude were broken since S3). docs/cross-repo-checkout-notice.md rewritten as the T7 deprecation instruction with step-by-step removal guidance + survives / retired summary. Test results: Layer-1 553 passing + 2 failing (both pre-existing, confirmed via git-stash comparison); Layer-3 14 passing + 4 failing (all pre-existing, same stash-comparison evidence). S4 added no regressions; net Layer-1 test-count drop (~80 tests) matches the test-file deletion footprint.

reason.specifics: S4 closes with the extension TS surface clean and the Set 045 Explorer revert applied per P4. Per the locked spec §5, S5 (final session) picks up: CLAUDE.md rewrite (retire the 'Hard-coordination enforcement (Sets 033 / 036) is OFF by default' section + add Set 049 entry to the version walk); docs/ai-led-session-workflow.md Step 6 / Step 8 references that cite the coordination layer; a focused 15-20 item rip-out UAT checklist; PyPI dabbler-ai-router minor bump + Marketplace dabbler-ai-orchestration minor bump (operator picks version at S5 start, default recommendation: minor for the orchestrator-block reshape + accept-with-warning behavior, acknowledging the breaking nature of new_chat_id.py retirement); CHANGELOG entries in both ai_router/ and tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/; change-log.md for Set 049; final close-out per workflow Step 8. Verification: Round A + Round B (final session). Two S4 spec divergences (HarvestService.ts deleted not stubbed + Gemini/Copilot installer shims deleted) flagged in s4-close-reason.md §Spec divergences for S5 verifier review.
